facebook.caption:
3,706 reviews on a pearl farm. Phu Quoc doesn't play around.

Ngọc Hiền Pearl Farm on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where you see exactly how Phu Quoc's famous pearls go from oyster to necklace. Watch the full process, browse the jewelry, and actually understand what you're buying.

4.2 stars across thousands of visitors. Worth the stop.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch a pearl get pulled straight from the oyster. Ngọc Hiền Pearl Farm makes the whole process visible, start to finish. 3,706 reviews back it up.

Ngọc Hiền Pearl Farm, 4.2 stars. See the full oyster-to-jewelry process before you buy. Tag your travel buddy.
